channel.title: OpenAI-Selection
channel.description: OpenAI News から選別された記事フィード

item.title: 中小企業向けChatGPTプログラムの紹介(Introducing the ChatGPT for small business program)
item.description: OpenAI launches the ChatGPT for Small Businesses program, helping entrepreneurs build AI skills, automate work, and grow with ChatGPT Work.

item.title: OpenAIとHugging Face、モデル評価中のセキュリティインシデントに対処するため提携(OpenAI and Hugging Face partner to address security incident during model evaluation)
item.description: OpenAI and Hugging Face share early findings from a security incident during AI model evaluation, highlighting advanced cyber capabilities and lessons for defenders.

item.title: David VélezとRobin VinceがOpenAI FoundationおよびOpenAI Group PBCの役員会に就任(David Vélez and Robin Vince join the boards of the OpenAI Foundation and OpenAI Group PBC)
item.description: David Vélez and Robin Vince join the boards of the OpenAI Foundation and OpenAI Group PBC, bringing global leadership in finance, technology, and governance.
